scope_note: Stage One: variables, basic data types, input/output, operators, conditionals, loops, lists only. No functions, classes, files, recursion, dictionaries, tuples, or external libraries.

knowledge_units.name: Variables and Assignment
knowledge_units.description: Storing a value in a named variable using the assignment operator =.

knowledge_units.name: Print Output
knowledge_units.description: Using print() to display values to the user.

knowledge_units.name: User Input
knowledge_units.description: Using input() to read a line of text from the user.

knowledge_units.name: Integer and Float Types
knowledge_units.description: Whole numbers (int) and decimal numbers (float) and their literals.

knowledge_units.name: String Type
knowledge_units.description: Text as string literals in single or double quotes.

knowledge_units.name: Boolean Type
knowledge_units.description: True and False values for conditions.

knowledge_units.name: Arithmetic Operators
knowledge_units.description: +, -, *, /, //, %, ** for numeric computation.

knowledge_units.name: Comparison Operators
knowledge_units.description: ==, !=, <, >, <=, >= for comparing values.

knowledge_units.name: Logical Operators
knowledge_units.description: and, or, not for combining boolean expressions.

knowledge_units.name: String Concatenation
knowledge_units.description: Joining strings with + and repeating with *.

knowledge_units.name: Simple If
knowledge_units.description: Executing code only when a condition is true, using if and indentation.

knowledge_units.name: If-Else
knowledge_units.description: Choosing between two branches with if and else.

knowledge_units.name: If-Elif-Else
knowledge_units.description: Multiple branches using if, elif, and else.

knowledge_units.name: While Loop
knowledge_units.description: Repeating code while a condition is true.
knowledge_units.example_correct_code:
i = 0
while i < 5:
    print(i)
    i = i + 1

knowledge_units.name: For Loop with range()
knowledge_units.description: Repeating a fixed number of times using for and range().

knowledge_units.name: For Loop Over Sequence
knowledge_units.description: Iterating over each element of a string or list with for.

knowledge_units.name: List Creation
knowledge_units.description: Creating a list with square brackets and comma-separated values.

knowledge_units.name: List Indexing
knowledge_units.description: Accessing list elements by index (0-based); negative indices from the end.

knowledge_units.name: List Basics (len, append)
knowledge_units.description: Getting length with len(); adding an element with append().

knowledge_units.name: List Iteration
knowledge_units.description: Looping over list elements with for.
